title: Minecraft Base
description: Modpack meant to optimize performance, Fix bugs, Add Bedrock parity and Other tweaks
body:
Modpack meant to optimize performance, Fix bugs, Add Bedrock parity and Other tweaks

This modpack is meant to be used as a template for other modpack or as is, if you publish a modpack using this modpack as a base (modified or not) you must link to this page
